testcase.name: Day 08 – Parallel Testing & Reporting › should display error for empty username
Day 08 – Parallel Testing & Reporting › should display error for empty password
Day 08 – Parallel Testing & Reporting › should display errors for empty username and password
Day 08 – Parallel Testing & Reporting › should display alert for invalid credentials
Day 08 – Parallel Testing & Reporting › should login successfully with valid credentials & display dashboard
Day 08 – Parallel Testing & Reporting › should display error for empty username
Day 08 – Parallel Testing & Reporting › should display error for empty password
Day 08 – Parallel Testing & Reporting › should display errors for empty username and password
Day 08 – Parallel Testing & Reporting › should display alert for invalid credentials
Day 08 – Parallel Testing & Reporting › should login successfully with valid credentials & display dashboard
